settings.heading:
Gearing up a team?
Let's talk numbers.
settings.body: We work directly with lifeguard agencies, beach patrols, and water rescue teams to outfit entire units. Tell us what you need, and we'll get back to you with pricing and lead times built for your size.
settings.note: Institutional and government pricing available. We'll follow up to confirm details.
settings.form_note: Fill this out and we'll build a quote around your unit.
settings.success: Got it — we'll be in touch within 1–2 business days.
settings.fine_print: No commitment, just a conversation. We usually reply within 1–2 business days.

settings.title: Volume Pricing
settings.body: Better per-unit pricing the more your team needs.

settings.title: Outfit the Whole Unit
settings.body: Consistent, dependable gear for everyone on the team.

settings.title: Priority Lead Times
settings.body: We plan production around your season and your size.
